description: matches treats '' as a catch-all and uses prefix + '.' so '10' does not match '100...'; next_hop returns the gateway of the longest matching prefix; default_route returns the '' rule's gateway.
Longest-prefix match really wins (10.0.0.5 -> R2, not R1); an unknown address falls through to the default; default_route returns '' when there is no default rule.
next_hop reuses matches rather than re-checking prefixes by hand; clear names; a return on every path.
